commit.message:
redesign: sender-generated secret, ECIES encryption, two-step claim

Payment flow corrected:
- Sender generates HTLC preimage R, computes H = sha256(R)
- Sender encrypts {secret:R, subject, body} together with recipient's
  secp256k1 pubkey (ECIES: ECDH + HKDF + AES-256-GCM, Node.js builtins only)
- Server verifies incoming payment proof, creates outgoing SF state locked by H
- Recipient polls → GET /inbox/:id/preview returns encryptedPayload + pendingPayment
- Recipient decrypts locally to get R, verifies hash(R)==H, then reveals via /claim
- Server settles both channels on reveal

New packages/crypto: encryptMail, decryptMail, hashSecret, verifySecretHash
New server endpoints: GET /inbox/:id/preview (pre-claim encrypted payload)
Updated auth: compact ECDSA sig over sha256(payload), pubkey stored on first auth
Dockerfile + docker-compose.yml for one-command deployment
HOSTING.md: DO/AWS/Fly.io comparison with budget (~$0–10/month for PoC)

commit.message:
Replace channel-based cross-thread transfer with split-counter atomic lease tracking

Eliminates the unsound raw *const Sender in SendableBuffer (from 656891e)
by removing the channel entirely. Arena now uses a split counter: Cell for
local ops, AtomicUsize for cross-thread returns. SendableBuffer::drop does
a single fetch_add(1, Release) — no channel, no Sender, no Arc.

Removes TransferHandle, ReturnedBuffer, drain_returns(), crossbeam-channel
dep from turbine-core. into_sendable() takes no arguments.

commit.message:
Fix tool loop detection to scope to current turn only

The client tool call round counter was counting across the entire
conversation history. After a previous tool loop, subsequent messages
would immediately trigger truncation (stripping all tools), making
the model unable to use weather, time, or any other tools.

Now counts only tool call rounds since the last user message, so each
new user turn gets a fresh budget of tool calls.

Fix false doubleheader detection from D1Baseball category dupes

D1Baseball lists the same game under multiple category sections (Top 25,
SEC, Southland, etc.), each with a different data-key. This caused
single-game teams to appear as doubleheaders and show spurious "Gm 1"
tags. Fix by also deduplicating tiles by box_score_url — same box score
= same game regardless of which category section listed it.

commit.message:
QuickFind v0.6.0 — 20 improvements: ReFS/Dev Drive, USN V3/V4, batch DB writes, non-admin fallback, search history, result highlighting, column filters, keyboard nav, token auth, build script

- core/ntfs.py: ReFS filesystem support, USN V3/V4 128-bit file IDs, cancel checks every 4096 records
- core/cache.py: db_batch_apply() single-transaction writes, PRAGMA integrity_check + auto-recovery, search_history table, DB v3
- core/index.py: Non-admin os.scandir fallback, deferred path resolution queue, entries_per_sec perf metrics
- gui/results_view.py: HighlightDelegate for match painting, ColumnFilterRow per-column filters, keyboard shortcuts (Enter/Del/F2/Ctrl+Enter), column show/hide context menu
- gui/main_window.py: QCompleter search history autocomplete, syntax help panel, column visibility persistence, perf metrics status bar
- gui/settings_dialog.py: column_visibility dict, http_auth_token field, export/import settings buttons
- gui/tray.py: Proper .ico app icon with multi-size generation
- cli/es.py: SQLite DB cache for instant results, --reindex flag
- server/http_server.py: Token-based auth via query param or Bearer header
- quickfind.py: Graceful UAC fallback, version bump to 0.6.0
- build.py: New PyInstaller packaging script (--onefile/--onedir/--clean)

commit.message:
Fix rapid-tap vote exploit: stop API responses from resetting the gate

The votesUsedRef was being reset by each returning API response
(which reported a lagging server count), allowing the user to
slip past the vote limit indefinitely. Now individual vote API
responses don't update the ref — only the periodic poll does once
voting has settled.

Also removed the full optimistic song mutation that caused wrong
netScore/upvote/downvote numbers during rapid taps. Replaced with
a minimal votes-array update for instant button highlighting only;
actual numbers come from the 800ms post-vote server sync.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- index.html redirecting to main.html (canonical)

commit.message:
fix: populate collection owner via on-chain fallback for already-fetched collections

Guard in handleCollectionMetadataFetch now only skips when metadataStatus=FETCHED
AND owner is already set. Collections with null owner will re-run the on-chain
owner() call even if metadata was already indexed. Backfill endpoint also now
includes owner=null collections.

commit.message:
Initial commit: full-stack Invoice Generator with Tesseract 5 OCR

- React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS frontend with drag-drop upload,
  invoice editor, PDF preview, and real-time SSE status updates
- Node.js 20 + Fastify backend with JWT auth, RBAC, BullMQ job queue,
  Prisma + PostgreSQL, MinIO/S3 file storage, Puppeteer PDF generation
- Python 3.11 OCR worker: OpenCV preprocessing (grayscale→deskew→denoise→
  CLAHE→binarize), Tesseract 5 LSTM multi-PSM with confidence scoring,
  regex field extraction supporting Indonesian number formats
- Docker Compose stack (7 services): postgres, redis, minio, api, ocr-worker,
  frontend, nginx; Kubernetes manifests with HPA for production
- GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline; comprehensive README and architecture docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(renderer): water rendering, clip plane fix, terrain entity fix, unindexed mesh support

- Water rendering system: reflection FBO, animated waves, Schlick fresnel, WATER shader (GLSL 330)
- 8 Lua bindings: createWater, setWaterLevel, setWaterColor, setWaterDeepColor, setWaterOpacity, setWaterWaveSpeed, setWaterWaveScale, removeWater
- Fix post-processing black screen: add gl_ClipDistance guard in all 3D shaders (dot(clipPlane,clipPlane)<0.001 → 1.0)
- Fix terrain not rendering: loadTerrain binding now creates ECS entity with Terrain+Transform3D
- Add unindexed mesh support: generate trivial index buffer for non-indexed glTF (fox.glb)
- Process reform: game-dev-tester→demo author, api-designer owns README+website
- 40 new water tests, 1333 total tests, zero warnings (Clang-18)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: rename auth route from [...nextauth] to [...auth]

Auth.js v5 expects the catch-all segment to be named "auth" by default,
not "nextauth". The old name caused UnknownAction errors because Auth.js
could not parse the action from the URL path correctly.

commit.message:
feat: Add market signals pipeline and fix news ticker extraction

Phase 2 — Signal computation (services/signals.py):
- Pearson correlation matrix across 23 tickers (recalculated every 30s)
- Sector strength index with ranking and trend detection
- Volatility regime detection per ticker and district (calm/normal/choppy/storm)
- Market breadth: advance/decline ratio with signal classification
- All signals computed during cache rebuild and fed into agent context
- New endpoint: GET /api/market/signals

Phase 3 — News improvements:
- Word-boundary regex for symbols >=3 chars
- Company-name matching for short symbols (T, DE, GS) — eliminates false
  positives like "T" matching "Trump" or "DE" matching "Defense"
- Headline deduplication via Jaccard similarity (>50% token overlap = skip)
- Simplified district_id assignment with direct lookup map
- Added COMPANY_NAMES mapping to ticker_mapping.py

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix font path: use process.cwd() for reliable path in Next.js production build

import.meta.url in compiled Next.js bundles points to .next/server/chunks/,
causing the font to resolve to the wrong directory. process.cwd() always
points to the project root at runtime.

security: CORS restriction + agent SSRF/file-access hardening
